tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend test harness (supertest + fixtures + exportable app)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make server.js importable for tests without starting the HTTP listener, install supertest, add reusable fixture helper, convert stub test to real smoke test.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/package.json
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/helpers/fixture.js
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/helpers/env.js
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/server.test.js

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm install && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/package.json", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/helpers/fixture.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/helpers/env.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/server.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm install && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm test passes", "server.js not starting listener in test mode", "smoke test asserts 200 on /health", "supertest in devDependencies"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — GET /api/jobs/:id/dataset/counts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Return total URL count per dataset category (success/error/nfr) without Redis dependency (derive domain from filesystem).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js (add listDatasetDirs + handler)
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/dataset-counts.test.js

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/dataset-counts.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/dataset-counts.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/dataset-counts.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["accurate counts from filesystem", "missing category returns 0", "skips malformed JSON", "JWT-protected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend — GET /api/jobs/:id/dataset/urls
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Paginated, searchable URL list per dataset category. Error rows include error message derived from errorMessages[0] / statusCode fallback / 'Unknown error'.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js (add deriveErrorMessage + handler)
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/dataset-urls.test.js

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/dataset-urls.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/dataset-urls.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/dataset-urls.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["paginated response shape", "error shape {url, error}", "search case-insensitive", "400 on invalid category", "skips malformed files", "limit cap + page coerce"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend — extend /request-queues with status filter + counts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add status filter (all|pending|handled) and unfiltered counts: {total, pending, handled} to existing /request-queues endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js (rewrite /request-queues handler)
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/request-queues-status.test.js

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/request-queues-status.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/server.js", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend/tests/request-queues-status.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-backend && npm test -- tests/request-queues-status.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["status=pending filters", "status=handled filters", "counts always unfiltered", "isHandled on each item"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Frontend — install react-simple-code-editor + prismjs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the two libraries used by the syntax-highlighted JSON editor in Task 10.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/package.json
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/yarn.lock

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/package.json", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/yarn.lock"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deps present in package.json", "yarn build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — extract DuplicatesTab.jsx (pure refactor)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move existing duplicate-analysis UI out of DatasetAnalyzer.jsx into its own file. No behavior change.

**Files:**
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DuplicatesTab.jsx
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DatasetAnalyzer.jsx (temporary shell)

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DuplicatesTab.jsx", "apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DatasetAnalyzer.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DuplicatesTab renders standalone", "DatasetAnalyzer uses it", "no regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend — create UrlListBrowser.jsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared component used by 3 URL-browsing tabs. Server-side pagination (50/page), debounced search (300ms), per-row layout adapts for error category.

**Files:**
- Create: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/UrlListBrowser.jsx

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/UrlListBrowser.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["server-side pagination", "debounced search", "category-aware rows", "empty/error/loading states"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — refactor DatasetAnalyzer to tabbed container
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace temporary single-tab shell with a tabbed container (Succès / Erreurs / Non-FR / Doublons). URL tabs render UrlListBrowser; last tab renders DuplicatesTab.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DatasetAnalyzer.jsx

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/DatasetAnalyzer.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["counts fetched on mount", "tabs show counts", "active tab styling", "tab switch unmounts", "close navigates back"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — Queue counts bar + status filter + row glyphs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend RequestQueueEditor.jsx with Total/Traités/En attente counts bar, [Tous][Traités][En attente] segmented toggle, and per-row status glyph (○ / ✓).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/RequestQueueEditor.jsx

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/RequestQueueEditor.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["counts bar constant under filter", "segmented toggle works", "filter resets page", "row glyph from isHandled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Frontend — syntax-highlighted JSON editor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace plain textarea with react-simple-code-editor + prismjs. Pretty-print on load. Preserve Format + Save behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/RequestQueueEditor.jsx

**Verify:** cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend/src/components/RequestQueueEditor.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-monitor-frontend && yarn build && yarn lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["highlighted pretty-printed JSON", "editable", "Format/Save unchanged", "scoped styles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: End-to-end manual QA + final sanity commit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk through full spec acceptance checklist on a live deployment; fix any regressions.

**Verify:** Manual QA per spec §9 checklist.

